initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT i_item_id, p_promo_id, SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM store_sales
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN promotion ON store_sales.ss_promo_sk = promotion.p_promo_sk
JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_date >= '2000-05-25'
  AND date_dim.d_date <= '2000-07-24'
GROUP BY i_item_id, p_promo_id
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    p_promo_id,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
JOIN 
    item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN 
    promotion ON store_sales.ss_promo_sk = promotion.p_promo_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_date >= '2000-05-25'
    AND date_dim.d_date <= '2000-07-24'
GROUP BY 
    i_item_id, p_promo_id
ORDER BY 
    i_item_id, p_promo_id
LIMIT 100
